properties.name: app.backend-public-url
properties.description: Public backend URL used in OpenAPI server metadata.

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins.

properties.name: jwt.expiration
properties.description: Access token expiration time in milliseconds

properties.name: jwt.refresh-expiration
properties.description: Refresh token expiration time in milliseconds

properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key for JWT signing (minimum 256 bits)
